calendar.matters: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-27-2026 Continued To Jul-15-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-15-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS NEWREZ LLC, US BANK TRUST NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, ANH PHAM, SKYGROUP REALTY INC'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT

Appearances via Zoom:
Jonathan Cahill of Klinedinst PC (916.282.0100, jcahill@klinedinstlaw.com) for defendants NewRez LLC and US Bank Trust National Association;
Michael Smith of Manning & Kass Ellrod Ramirez Trester LLP (415.217.6990, michael.smith@manningkass.com) for defendants Anh Pham and Skygroup Realty Inc.;
Nelson Goodell of the Goodell Law Firm (415.495.3950, nelson@goodelllawsf.com) for plaintiff Jana Spotts.

Argued and the court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts (not conclusions) in support of each element as to each defendant of each cause of action for 1st cause of action for violation of CC 2923.6; 2nd cause of action for violation of CC 2923.7; 3rd cause of action for violation of CC 3273.11; 4th cause of action for wrongful foreclosure; 5th cause of action for Violation of Rosenthal Act and 10th cause of action for Conversion. Demurrer is otherwise overruled, all other causes of action are sufficiently stated. Plaintiff shall have 15 days to file an amended complaint. All amendments shall be in bold font. Defendant's request for judicial notice is granted as to the existence of the documents and their legal effect. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/CFH)
